basic_details.job_title: DRDO DEBEL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Defence Bioengineering & Electromedical Laboratory (DRDO DEBEL) Graduate Apprentice Notification 2026 has been released on 23 April 2026 on the official website www.drdo.gov.in . A total of 28 vacancies have been announced through the DRDO DEBEL Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Mechanical Engg: BE/B.Tech Electronics / ECE / E & I: BE/B.Tech Computer Science / Information Technology: BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Chemical Engineering/Chemistry: BE/B.Tech/B.Sc Bio-Medical Engg: BE/B.Tech Textile Engg: BE/B.Tech Library Science: B.Lib/B.L.I.Sc Physics: B.Sc Accounts: B.Com

selection_process: Merit basis (percentage of graduation degree) Interview/Interaction if required
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 20-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of DRDO DEBEL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DRDO DEBEL Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the DRDO DEBEL Graduate Apprentice recruitment is 20th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by DRDO DEBEL?
faq.answer: DRDO DEBEL has announced a total of 28 vacancies for the Graduate Apprentice posts. These positions are spread across various engineering and science disciplines.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The required educational qualifications include BE/B.Tech in various engineering disciplines, B.Sc in relevant subjects, B.Com for accounts, and B.Lib/B.L.I.Sc for library science positions.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Graduate Apprentice position?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 12,300/-. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for DRDO DEBEL Graduate Apprentice recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: The selection process is primarily based on the merit of the graduation degree percentage. An interview or interaction may also be conducted if deemed necessary.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The Graduate Apprentice positions are contractual in nature, offering valuable experience in a government research laboratory.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the Defence Bioengineering & Electromedical Laboratory (DRDO DEBEL) located?
faq.answer: Defence Bioengineering & Electromedical Laboratory (DRDO DEBEL) is located in Bengaluru, Karnataka.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the DRDO DEBEL recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits, nor does it mention age relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the detailed notification.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the DRDO DEBEL Graduate Apprentice posts?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official DRDO DEBEL website or the provided application link before the last date of 20th May 2026.
